title: Professional Audio Headphones 2026 Review: 10 Professional Recording and Mixing Headphones Comparison
description: Deep review of Sony, Beyerdynamic, Audio-Technica and 10 audio production headphones covering sound quality, comfort, and closed-back design to help produc
content:
2026 Audio Production Headphones Review

Audio production headphones are essential tools for recording and mixing. From closed-back recording monitoring to open-back mixing reference, choosing suitable professional headphones directly impacts recording quality and mixing decisions. In 2026, the professional headphones market continuously innovates in comfort and planar driver technology. This article reviews 10 professional audio production headphones to help producers choose the best recording mixing headphones.

Professional Headphones Review

1. Sony MDR-7506

Sony MDR-7506 is a classic professional headphone, frequency response accurate suitable for recording monitoring. Closed-back design effectively isolates sound, lightweight comfortable suitable for long-time use. Price $100, is studio standard headphones.

2. Beyerdynamic DT 770 Pro

Beyerdynamic DT 770 Pro provides powerful low-frequency and comfortable wearing, closed-back design sound isolation good. German manufacturing quality sturdy durable, suitable for long-time recording monitoring. Price $150, suitable for recording and monitoring.

3. Audio-Technica ATH-M50x

Audio-Technica ATH-M50x provides powerful low-frequency and clear mid-high range, closed-back design sound isolation good. Foldable design portable, suitable for studio and live monitoring. Price $150, is popular professional headphones.

4. Sennheiser HD 650

Sennheiser HD 650 is open-back mixing reference headphones, frequency response natural transparent. Open-back design provides open soundstage, suitable for mixing reference and appreciation. Price $350, suitable for mixing reference and professional appreciation.

5. AKG K712 Pro

AKG K712 Pro is open-back mixing reference headphones, frequency response open natural. Austrian manufacturing quality excellent, comfortable wearing suitable for long-time mixing. Price $350, suitable for mixing reference.

6. Neumann NDH 20

Neumann NDH 20 is closed-back professional headphones, inheriting Neumann's precision tradition. Frequency response accurate suitable for recording and mixing monitoring, German manufacturing quality excellent. Price $300, suitable for high-end studios.

7. Shure SRH1540

Shure SRH1540 is closed-back high-end headphones, aluminum frame lightweight comfortable. Frequency response balanced suitable for recording and mixing monitoring, American manufacturing quality sturdy. Price $400, suitable for high-end studios.

8. Focal Listen Professional

Focal Listen Professional is closed-back professional headphones, Focal's unique technology provides clear sound quality. French manufacturing quality excellent, comfortable wearing suitable for long-time use. Price $300, suitable for high-end studios.

9. Audeze LCD-1

Audeze LCD-1 is planar driver open headphones, planar driver provides ultimate details. Lightweight design comfortable wearing, suitable for high-end mixing reference and appreciation. Price $800, suitable for high-end mixing reference.

10. Superlux HD681 Evo

Superlux HD681 Evo is budget-friendly headphones, semi-open design provides basic monitoring. Price extremely low suitable for entry budget, price $40, suitable for entry budget.

Selection Suggestions

Recording Monitoring Needs: Sony MDR-7506, Beyerdynamic DT 770 Pro, Audio-Technica ATH-M50x provide closed-back recording monitoring. Suggest studio standard Sony MDR-7506.

Mixing Reference Needs: Sennheiser HD 650, AKG K712 Pro, Audeze LCD-1 provide open-back mixing reference. Suggest mixing reference choose Sennheiser HD 650.

High-end Studio Needs: Neumann NDH 20, Shure SRH1540, Focal Listen Professional provide high-end closed-back monitoring, suitable for high-end studios.

Entry Budget Needs: Superlux HD681 Evo provides lowest price basic monitoring, suitable for entry budget.

2026 Trends

Planar Driver Popularization: Audeze planar headphones indicate high-end technology becoming more accessible. Expected in 2027, planar drivers will be more popular in budget headphones, providing ultimate details.

Comfort Enhancement: Beyerdynamic and Shure comfort design indicates long-time use importance. Expected in 2027, headphones will more focus on comfort, suitable for long-time recording mixing.

Budget Professional Improvement: Superlux and entry headphones quality improved. Entry producers can obtain basic professional monitoring. Expected in 2027, budget headphones will be closer to professional levels.

Conclusion

Choosing suitable audio production headphones is key to recording and mixing. In 2026, professional headphones made progress in planar driver and comfort. Sony MDR-7506 is studio standard. Suggest recording monitoring use Sony MDR-7506 or Beyerdynamic DT 770 Pro, mixing reference use Sennheiser HD 650, high-end studio use Neumann NDH 20, entry budget use Superlux HD681 Evo. Recording headphones and mixing headphones should be separately configured. Closed-back recording monitoring and open-back mixing reference combined use.
author: Audio Headphones Expert
